name: graphint
description: Graph intelligence library for ingesting documents, building typed knowledge graphs, and querying them with LLMs
author: Julius Haring

scripts.fl: npm run format && npm run lint
scripts.release:amend: npm run fl && git add CHANGELOG.md package.json package-lock.json && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit --amend --no-edit --no-verify)
scripts.release: npm run test:unit && commit-and-tag-version && npm run release:amend && npm publish
scripts.release:patch: npm run test:unit && commit-and-tag-version --release-as patch && npm run release:amend && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm run test:unit && commit-and-tag-version --release-as minor && npm run release:amend && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm run test:unit && commit-and-tag-version --release-as major && npm run release:amend && npm publish
